code:
-- Run via Roblox Studio MCP: execute_luau (full body). Ensures FTUE pointer ScreenGuis under StarterGui:
-- Each: ScreenGui → Canvas (viewport root) → PointerRoot (sized/positioned, scale-based) → Arrow (TextLabel).
-- Names: ShipOilPointer, StraitPointer, SellOilPointer, OilPricePointer.
-- Safe to re-run: updates Canvas/PointerRoot/Arrow if already present.

local StarterGui = game:GetService("StarterGui")

local ORDER = { "ShipOilPointer", "StraitPointer", "SellOilPointer", "OilPricePointer" }

-- Scale positions on full-screen Canvas (matches HUD viewport shell; tweak in Properties after).
local SPECS = {
	ShipOilPointer = {
		ap = Vector2.new(0, 0.5),
		pos = UDim2.new(0.11, 0, 0.52, 0),
		sz = UDim2.new(0.055, 0, 0.075, 0),
	},
	StraitPointer = {
		ap = Vector2.new(1, 0),
		pos = UDim2.new(0.91, 0, 0.09, 0),
		sz = UDim2.new(0.05, 0, 0.07, 0),
	},
	SellOilPointer = {
		ap = Vector2.new(0, 0.5),
		pos = UDim2.new(0.11, 0, 0.62, 0),
		sz = UDim2.new(0.055, 0, 0.075, 0),
	},
	OilPricePointer = {
		ap = Vector2.new(0, 0),
		pos = UDim2.new(0.045, 0, 0.11, 0),
		sz = UDim2.new(0.06, 0, 0.055, 0),
	},
}

local function ensureCanvas(sg: ScreenGui): Frame
	local c = sg:FindFirstChild("Canvas")
	if c and c:IsA("Frame") then
		return c
	end
	if c then
		c:Destroy()
	end
	local canvas = Instance.new("Frame")
	canvas.Name = "Canvas"
	canvas.Size = UDim2.fromScale(1, 1)
	canvas.Position = UDim2.fromScale(0.5, 0.5)
	canvas.AnchorPoint = Vector2.new(0.5, 0.5)
	canvas.BackgroundTransparency = 1
	canvas.BorderSizePixel = 0
	canvas.ClipsDescendants = false
	canvas.Parent = sg
	return canvas
end

local function ensurePointerRoot(canvas: Frame, spec): Frame
	local pr = canvas:FindFirstChild("PointerRoot")
	if not (pr and pr:IsA("Frame")) then
		if pr then
			pr:Destroy()
		end
		pr = Instance.new("Frame")
		pr.Name = "PointerRoot"
		pr.BackgroundTransparency = 1
		pr.BorderSizePixel = 0
		pr.ClipsDescendants = false
		pr.Parent = canvas
	end
	pr.AnchorPoint = spec.ap
	pr.Position = spec.pos
	pr.Size = spec.sz
	return pr
end

local function ensureArrow(parent: Instance): TextLabel
	local a = parent:FindFirstChild("Arrow")
	if a and a:IsA("TextLabel") then
		return a
	end
	if a then
		a:Destroy()
	end
	local t = Instance.new("TextLabel")
	t.Name = "Arrow"
	t.BackgroundTransparency = 1
	t.BorderSizePixel = 0
	t.Size = UDim2.fromScale(1, 1)
	t.Text = "➜"
	t.TextScaled = true
	t.Font = Enum.Font.GothamBold
	t.TextColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(255, 220, 80)
	t.Parent = parent
	local utc = Instance.new("UITextSizeConstraint")
	utc.MaxTextSize = 48
	utc.MinTextSize = 12
	utc.Parent = t
	return t
end

local out = {}
for _, name in ipairs(ORDER) do
	local spec = SPECS[name]
	local node: Instance? = StarterGui:FindFirstChild(name, true)
	while node ~= nil and node:IsA("GuiObject") and not node:IsA("ScreenGui") do
		table.insert(out, "removed " .. node.ClassName .. ": " .. node:GetFullName())
		node:Destroy()
		node = StarterGui:FindFirstChild(name, true)
	end
	if not node then
		local sg = Instance.new("ScreenGui")
		sg.Name = name
		sg.ResetOnSpawn = false
		sg.ZIndexBehavior = Enum.ZIndexBehavior.Sibling
		sg.IgnoreGuiInset = false
		sg.DisplayOrder = 20
		sg.Enabled = false
		sg.Parent = StarterGui
		node = sg
		table.insert(out, "created " .. name)
	end
	if node and node:IsA("ScreenGui") then
		local sg = node :: ScreenGui
		sg.ResetOnSpawn = false
		sg.DisplayOrder = math.max(20, sg.DisplayOrder)
		local canvas = ensureCanvas(sg)
		local pr = ensurePointerRoot(canvas, spec)
		ensureArrow(pr)
		table.insert(out, "patched ScreenGui " .. name)
	end
end

return table.concat(out, "\n")
